kill_fact: The catalyst SURVIVES but the load-bearing DATE is wrong. The file repeatedly states ECLIPSE 1 Phase 3 topline 'expected Q4 2026' and treats that as the near-term hard catalyst. The primary source (Vir's Nov 3, 2025 enrollment-completion release, confirmed on businesswire/eatg/stocktitan) says: 'The last patient in ECLIPSE 1 is expected to reach the trial's primary endpoint (primary completion date) in the fourth quarter of 2026, WITH TOPLINE DATA EXPECTED IN THE FIRST QUARTER OF 2027.' Q4 2026 is only the last-patient-at-endpoint date; the equity-moving topline readout is Q1 2027 — a full quarter+ later than logged. The file also mis-frames ECLIPSE 2/3 as the 'Q1 2027' events when Q1 2027 is in fact ECLIPSE 1. The catalyst is genuinely LIVE, dated, fully-enrolled, registrational, and has NOT fired (live ~$8.86–9.41, no spread closed). The cash floor is REAL and independently verified: $809.3M cash/investments at 3/31/26 + ~$315M post-quarter Astellas proceeds, runway into 2H-2028, no ATM-into-event / no going-concern. So the asymmetry holds; only the timeline is off by a quarter, which (a) extends time-decay/biotech-beta exposure and (b) means the 'enrollment-complete removes the #1 slip driver, so Q4 2026 is near-locked' claim overstates de-risking — the readout is ~6+ months further out than the file implies.
corrections: 1) ECLIPSE 1 TOPLINE = Q1 2027, NOT Q4 2026 (Q4 2026 = last-patient primary-endpoint/primary-completion date only). Fix dated_milestone, catalyst_summary, forcing_function, event arc. 2) ECLIPSE 2 & 3 topline are NOT 'Q1 2027' — Q1 2027 belongs to ECLIPSE 1; ECLIPSE 2/3 enrollment is 'ongoing and on track' with no disclosed topline date as of the Nov-2025 release. 3) Live price ~$8.86 (mid-June 2026), modestly below the file's $9.41 mark — asymmetry to $20 target is marginally WIDER than logged, not narrower. 4) The 'enrollment complete closes the #1 slip driver' point stands for the trial finishing, but does NOT lock a Q4-2026 readout since topline was always guided to Q1 2027.
evidence: Vir Biotechnology, 'Announces Completion of Enrollment in ECLIPSE 1 Phase 3 Trial for Chronic Hepatitis Delta,' Nov 3, 2025 (BusinessWire/EATG/StockTitan): 'The last patient in ECLIPSE 1 is expected to reach the trial's primary endpoint (primary completion date) in the fourth quarter of 2026, with topline data expected in the first quarter of 2027.' — confirms TOPLINE = Q1 2027, not Q4 2026.

Vir Biotechnology Q1 2026 results (8-K, SEC EDGAR a20260506-q1ex991earningsr.htm; BioSpace 2026-05-06): ended 3/31/2026 with $809.3M cash, cash equivalents and investments; $315M Astellas proceeds received post-quarter; cash runway expected into the second half of 2028 — confirms the hard, financing-contingency-free floor.

Phase 2 SOLSTICE (Vir disclosures): undetectable HDV RNA in 88% of evaluable CHD participants at Week 96 on tobevibart + elebsiran combo — confirms the replicated de-risking efficacy signal the bull cites.

VIR quote data, June 2026 (stockanalysis/marketbeat, ~$8.86 as of 6/17/2026; 52-wk ~$4.16–$11.66; consensus Strong Buy, avg PT ~$21.56) — confirms the catalyst has NOT fired and the spread to target is intact.
